title: rubus × stenoacanthoides
intro: Rubus × stenoacanthoides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Rubus genus. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus × stenoacanthoides include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in jams and other culinary applications, showcasing its versatility in traditional medicine and food.
